name: O2C RPA-replacement scenarios
description: Full order-to-cash chain across happy path and three exception-recovery scenarios.

parts.text: Run the full O2C chain for customer 1000001, material MZ-FG-C100, quantity 10 (sales org 1010, channel 10, division 00).
The order-to-cash chain completed: sales order created, outbound delivery created, goods issue posted, and billing document created with a final invoice net amount of 500.
Run the full O2C chain for customer 1000002, material MZ-FG-C100, quantity 10 (sales org 1010, channel 10, division 00).
The customer was on credit hold so the delivery was blocked; the credit block was released and the chain then completed with a final invoice net amount of 500.
Run the full O2C chain for customer 1000001, material MZ-FG-OOS, quantity 10 (sales org 1010, channel 10, division 00).
Stock was insufficient, so a partial delivery was created for the 3 available units with the remaining 7 on backorder, and the chain completed.
Run the full O2C chain for customer 1000001, material MZ-FG-NP, quantity 10 (sales org 1010, channel 10, division 00).
Pricing was incomplete, so a pricing condition of 25 was applied to the item and the chain completed with a final invoice net amount of 250.
